features: Deep Cleansing: Formulated with a 30% concentration of Glycolic Acid, these pads thoroughly cleanse pores, removing excess oil and impurities for a clear, unclogged complexion.

Effective Pads: Glycolic Acid to tone, hydrate, exfoliate the skin, leaving your face youthful and feeling refreshed. Exfoliate the skin - for dull skin, oily skin, large pores, and dark spots, and also smooth fine wrinkles.
Gentle Formula: Enriched with soothing and moisturizing ingredients, these pads prevent dryness and irritation, suitable for all skin types.
Easy to Use: Convenient pad format for on-the-go use, no rinsing required（according to your needs）, allowing you to enjoy skincare anytime, anywhere.
50PCS Pads: You get 50 exfoliating facial pads, Make them part of your daily skin care routine, using one pad 2-3 times/week, For more sensitive skin types, we advise usage once a week.
description: Product Description Our 30% Glycolic Acid Pads wipes infused with Vitamin B5 & E, help to soothe the skin and tighten pores, which decreases the appearance of scars and wrinkles, and also keeps your skin soft, smooth, and hydrating. More Usage Suggestions: 1.Complete a small patch test behind the ear or under the chin before using it on the face. 2.Carefully follow directions for application, wipe pad over the desired area and wait 15 minutes(Per individual's skin tolerance). 3.Wash your face and use essence to moisturize skin. Use 2-3 times/week, for more sensitive skin types, we advise usage once a week. Product Specifications: Package Includes: 50pcs Glycolic Acid Pads Suitable for all skin types
